case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. MICHAEL E MARSHALL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEBRUARY 2, 2017 AT 1:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE S AGENCY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVICES MANAGER. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MARSHALL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE S AGENCY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVICES MANAGER. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MARSHALL IS NOT PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT APPEARED FEB-02-17 AT 8:30AM. THE CORRECT HEARING TIME WAS 1:30PM. THE PROOF OF SERVICE AND THE COPY OF THE SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM THAT WAS GIVEN TO THE DEFENDANT HAD A HEARING DATE OF FEB-02-17 AT 8:30AM. THE DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO RETURN AT 1:30PM. THE PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL WAS DID NOT OPPOSE THE CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
